lessons.context: Task: Generate complex report, took 90s but timeout at 60s
Task: Install pandas, but pip failed due to network issue
Task: Calculate average, but division by zero when list is empty
Task: Process large file, but ran out of memory (8GB used)

rules_derived: 网络请求必须有重试机制和超时设置
Always check timeout before starting complex tasks
Add input validation for all calculations
Monitor resource usage during file processing
考虑将复杂任务拆分为多个子任务以避免超时
使用 TimeoutManager 动态调整超时而非硬编码
